## Summary

<!-- One paragraph. What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Add / remove / reorder an upstream skill source
- [ ] Fix `install.sh`
- [ ] Fix `scripts/sync_skills.py`
- [ ] Fix `.github/workflows/sync-skills.yml`
- [ ] Documentation / README
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] I have **not** edited files inside `skills/` directly (those are managed by the weekly sync).
- [ ] If this changes the source list, I have updated both `scripts/sync_skills.py` and the README source table.
- [ ] If this changes `install.sh`, I have run `shellcheck install.sh` and a `--dry-run` test.
- [ ] If this changes the sync script, I have run `python scripts/sync_skills.py` locally.
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`.
